creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-05-26 04:32:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    MOVED 
    japanese             Makefile 
    japanese/platex-japanese Makefile 
  Removed files:
    japanese/latex-japanese Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  [MAINTAINER] japanese/latex-japanese: change portname to platex-japanese
  
          This port can be only usable with platex not with latex.
          To eliminate ambiguity which may lead users to try this
          package with genuine latex, it's be better change the prefix
          of portname to "platex-" instead of "latex-".
  
  PR:             ports/123626
  Submitted by:   Koji Yokota <yokota@res.otaru-uc.ac.jp>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1601    +2 -1      ports/MOVED
  1.683     +1 -1      ports/japanese/Makefile
  1.2       +0 -72     ports/japanese/latex-japanese/Makefile (dead)
  1.2       +0 -3      ports/japanese/latex-japanese/distinfo (dead)
  1.2       +0 -4      ports/japanese/latex-japanese/pkg-descr (dead)
  1.2       +0 -6      ports/japanese/latex-japanese/pkg-plist (dead)
  1.3       +4 -3      ports/japanese/platex-japanese/Makefile
